product_overview: Sabueso helps marketing and sales teams ingest lead lists, qualify them with AI, review enriched profiles, and run targeted outreach from a single dashboard.
core_goals: Ingest and centralize leads so users can operate from a single lead list
Qualify and enrich leads automatically and present actionable, hyper-personalized outreach suggestions
Allow SDRs to review lead detail and send outreach emails directly from the app
Enable quick handoff of qualified leads to closing teams with a rich lead profile

features.name: Authentication / Sign-in
features.description: Secure sign-in so authorized team members can access the dashboard and lead workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to /handler/sign-in -> Enter credentials -> Submit sign-in form -> Land on /dashboard and see list of leads

features.name: Lead Import
features.description: Upload a CSV of raw leads to bring external lead lists into Sabueso for processing and outreach.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Start a CSV import -> Map or confirm required columns -> Confirm import -> See imported leads appear in the lead list on the dashboard

features.name: Lead Dashboard (View & Manage Leads)
features.description: Browse, inspect and update the central list of leads so SDRs and operators can prioritize and act.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View list of leads -> Sort or filter the list to focus targets -> Select a lead to view details -> See lead detail and available outreach actions
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select a lead in the list -> Update lead qualification or status -> See the updated status reflected in the list

features.name: AI Processing & Outreach Suggestions
features.description: Automatically scrape and analyze lead websites to classify fit and generate a hyper-personalized first-contact message for SDR review.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Select imported leads or start processing for new imports -> Trigger AI processing for selected leads -> See AI classification (Qualified/Discarded) and a suggested personalized outreach message -> Edit or accept the suggested message

features.name: Lead Outreach Action (Send Email)
features.description: Compose or accept a suggested outreach message for a specific lead and send it, with immediate success/validation feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Select a lead to view details -> Initiate email outreach for that lead -> Review or edit the suggested message -> Send outreach email -> See success notification
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select a lead to view details -> Initiate email outreach -> Attempt to send with an empty subject or body -> See validation error and remain on the draft until fixed

routes.description: Detailed view for a specific lead and outreach actions

features.name: Lead Dashboard
features.description: View and manage all marketing leads in a dashboard
user_interactions: Click on a lead to view details

features.name: Lead Outreach Action
features.description: Send emails or perform outreach actions for a specific lead
user_interactions: Click the email button to send outreach
